fileNodes.languageNotes: Carries source file/line context in the error struct, mirroring QuantLib's location-aware exceptions.
fileNodes.name: errors.rs
fileNodes.summary: Defines the crate-wide QlError type and result alias plus require/ensure helper macros used to validate inputs across the math layer, porting QuantLib's QL_REQUIRE/QL_ENSURE error idioms to idiomatic Rust.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses the modified Lentz algorithm for the continued fraction, a standard Numerical Recipes technique.
fileNodes.name: beta.rs
fileNodes.summary: Implements the complete and regularized incomplete beta function via a Lentz continued-fraction expansion, underpinning the binomial CDF and Student-t distribution.

fileNodes.name: binomial.rs
fileNodes.summary: Provides the binomial probability mass function and its cumulative distribution, computing the PMF in log-space and the CDF through the incomplete beta relation.

fileNodes.name: chisquare.rs
fileNodes.summary: Provides the cumulative chi-square distribution as a thin wrapper that delegates to the cumulative gamma distribution at half the degrees of freedom.

fileNodes.name: gamma.rs
fileNodes.summary: Provides the cumulative gamma distribution, evaluating its CDF through the regularized lower incomplete gamma function with edge-case handling for NaN and infinities.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses a validated Probability newtype with TryFrom plus trait-based interfaces to express the distribution contract.
fileNodes.name: mod.rs
fileNodes.summary: Distributions module root that re-exports all distribution types and defines the shared Probability newtype and the Density, Cdf, Quantile, and Support traits forming the common distribution interface.

fileNodes.languageNotes: The inverse CDF splits a rational central approximation from a tail expansion, the classic Acklam/Moro algorithm.
fileNodes.name: normal.rs
fileNodes.summary: Implements the Gaussian family: the normal density, the cumulative normal via the error function, and the Beasley-Springer-Moro inverse cumulative normal used pervasively in option pricing.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Recurrence paths guard against floating-point underflow for large means, returning errors rather than silently producing zeros.
fileNodes.name: poisson.rs
fileNodes.summary: Implements the Poisson family: the PMF in log-space, the cumulative distribution via a stable recurrence, and the inverse cumulative (quantile) searching upward from the mass at zero.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Quantile uses Newton iteration over the CDF/PDF pair with support-bound clamping at the probability endpoints.
fileNodes.name: studentt.rs
fileNodes.summary: Implements the Student-t distribution with density, CDF via the incomplete beta function, survival, support bounds, and a Newton-based quantile solver.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses region-dependent rational approximations with hardcoded coefficient tables for full double precision.
fileNodes.name: errorfunction.rs
fileNodes.summary: Implements the Gauss error function erf(x) using a piecewise rational/polynomial approximation, the numerical foundation for the cumulative normal distribution.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Lanczos series with a fixed coefficient table; gamma applies the reflection formula for x < 1.
fileNodes.name: gammafunction.rs
fileNodes.summary: Implements the log-gamma function via the Lanczos approximation and the gamma function with reflection for negative arguments, the backbone of the beta and incomplete-gamma routines.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Chooses series vs continued-fraction representation by comparing x against a+1 for optimal convergence.
fileNodes.name: incompletegamma.rs
fileNodes.summary: Implements the regularized lower incomplete gamma function P(a,x), dispatching between a series expansion and a continued fraction, powering the gamma and chi-square CDFs.

fileNodes.name: types.rs
fileNodes.summary: Defines the crate's fundamental scalar type aliases (Real, Size, Integer, Time, and related) that mirror QuantLib's typedefs and keep the numeric vocabulary consistent across the library.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses Rc<RefCell<Link>> interior mutability so cloned handles share one mutable link and relinking propagates to all holders.
fileNodes.name: handle.rs
fileNodes.summary: Implements QuantLib's Handle/RelinkableHandle smart-pointer abstraction: a shared, observable indirection to a pointee whose target can be relinked at runtime with automatic observer notification.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Rust crate root declaring the module tree with mod/pub use re-exports.
fileNodes.name: lib.rs
fileNodes.summary: Crate root for libitofin that wires together the foundational modules (errors, types, patterns, handle, settings, shared, math, utilities) and exposes the public API surface.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Bool state flags (calculated/frozen/failed/updating) replicate the C++ recalculation state machine; the updating guard breaks recursive update cycles.
fileNodes.name: lazyobject.rs
fileNodes.summary: Ports QuantLib's LazyObject: caches an expensive calculation, invalidates it on input changes, and re-forwards notifications to downstream observers with freeze/unfreeze and recursion-guard semantics.

fileNodes.name: mod.rs
fileNodes.summary: Module barrel for the patterns package, re-exporting the observable, lazyobject, and visitor design-pattern primitives.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Observers are held as WeakMut to avoid keeping them alive; dead weaks are pruned on register/unregister/notify, and notify snapshots the list to tolerate reentrant registration.
fileNodes.name: observable.rs
fileNodes.summary: Implements the Observer/Observable notification pattern at the heart of QuantLib's dependency graph, with idempotent registration, weak-reference observer tracking, and reentrancy-safe notification.

fileNodes.languageNotes: A single generic trait Visitor<T> with one visit method, mirroring QuantLib's AcyclicVisitor entry point.
fileNodes.name: visitor.rs
fileNodes.summary: Defines the generic Visitor trait used to implement the visitor pattern across QuantLib-ported types.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Evaluation date is Option<Date> (None = floating/today); set/reset only fire notify_observers when the value genuinely changes.
fileNodes.name: settings.rs
fileNodes.summary: Ports QuantLib's global Settings singleton: holds the evaluation date and pricing flags, notifying registered observers when the evaluation date actually changes or resets to floating.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Centralizes the Rc/RefCell choice (decision D3) behind aliases so the smart-pointer kind can be swapped in one place.
fileNodes.name: shared.rs
fileNodes.summary: Defines the project's shared-ownership type aliases (Shared/SharedMut/Weak/WeakMut over Rc/RefCell) and ergonomic constructor helpers used throughout the observable graph.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Heavy use of Deref/Index/Neg/FromIterator trait impls and closure-based element-wise mapping to provide an ergonomic numeric vector type.
fileNodes.name: array.rs
fileNodes.summary: Defines the core `Array` 1-D vector primitive wrapping a `Vec<Real>`, with constructors, element-wise math (abs/sqrt/log/exp/pow), dot product, norm, and Deref/Index/operator trait impls. Mirrors QuantLib's Array type for the linear-algebra layer.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses `partition_point` for binary segment location and fallible `Result`-returning evaluation methods for out-of-range/NaN handling.
fileNodes.name: linear.rs
fileNodes.summary: Implements `LinearInterpolation` over monotonically increasing x-nodes, precomputing segment slopes and cumulative primitives, with optional extrapolation and NaN/finiteness validation. Ports QuantLib's LinearInterpolation.

fileNodes.name: mod.rs
fileNodes.summary: Interpolations module barrel that re-exports the linear submodule and defines the common `Interpolation` trait (value/derivative/primitive/domain queries) implemented by concrete interpolators.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses checked_mul for overflow-safe capacity, 1-D and 2-D Index impls, and multiple Mul trait impls for matrix*matrix, matrix*vector, and scalar products.
fileNodes.name: matrix.rs
fileNodes.summary: Defines the `Matrix` 2-D dense matrix primitive (row-major `Vec<Real>`) with constructors, row/diagonal/transpose accessors, indexing, and matrix/vector/scalar multiplication. Ports QuantLib's Matrix type.

fileNodes.name: mod.rs
fileNodes.summary: Math module barrel that declares and re-exports the array, matrix, interpolations, distributions, and special-function (beta/gamma/error) submodules.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Implements custom Clone/Default rather than deriving, using Box<T> with Option to model an optionally-empty owned slot.
fileNodes.name: clone.rs
fileNodes.summary: Provides ValueBox, a deep-clone heap container that ports QuantLib's clone-on-Clone semantics so cloning duplicates the owned value rather than sharing a pointer.

fileNodes.name: dataformatters.rs
fileNodes.summary: String formatting helpers for quantitative values (null sentinels, ordinals, percentages, rates, volatilities) ported from QuantLib's DataFormatters.

fileNodes.name: mod.rs
fileNodes.summary: Module barrel that declares and re-exports the utilities submodules (clone, dataformatters, null, steppingiterator).

fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses a trait with an associated null() sentinel and provided is_null() default method to emulate C++ template specialization.
fileNodes.name: null.rs
fileNodes.summary: Defines the Null trait providing sentinel null values and is_null checks for numeric types, porting QuantLib's Null<T> template.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Implements the std Iterator trait and uses saturating_add to avoid index overflow when stepping past the slice end.
fileNodes.name: steppingiterator.rs
fileNodes.summary: Provides StepIterator and the step_iter constructor that yield every nth element of a slice, porting QuantLib's stepping iterator.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Single-stage build chaining apt, the astral.sh uv install script, and `cargo install prek` in one RUN layer to keep the image lean.
fileNodes.name: Dockerfile
fileNodes.summary: Builds a Rust slim-bookworm tooling image for pre-commit/prek CI runs, installing curl, git, the uv installer, and the prek hook runner via cargo.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses a reusable workflow (benbenbang/reusable-workflows prek.yml) plus a concurrency group to cancel superseded runs.
fileNodes.name: pull-request.yml
fileNodes.summary: GitHub Actions pull-request workflow that runs pre-commit checks via a reusable workflow and applies PR labels on non-fork pull requests targeting main.

fileNodes.languageNotes: workflow_dispatch with a required boolean choice input gates the reusable semantic-release.yml workflow.
fileNodes.name: semantic-release.yml
fileNodes.summary: Manually-dispatched GitHub Actions workflow that triggers a semantic-release reusable workflow to cut a new versioned release when explicitly confirmed.

fileNodes.name: .dockerignore
fileNodes.summary: Docker build context exclusion file for the repository; minimal single-line rule keeping unwanted files out of any container build context.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Hooks enforce the project's quality gates (fmt/clippy/test) locally, mirroring CI.
fileNodes.name: .pre-commit-config.yaml
fileNodes.summary: Pre-commit hook configuration running cargo fmt, check, clippy, and test plus conventional-commit and file-hygiene checks before every commit across the Cargo workspace.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses a conventional-commits preset with custom presetConfig to drive automated semantic versioning.
fileNodes.name: .releaserc.json
fileNodes.summary: semantic-release configuration defining branches, conventional-commit parsing, changelog/release-note presets, and tag format for automated versioning and releases.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Virtual workspace with members = ["crates/*"] so new crates need no root-manifest edit.
fileNodes.name: Cargo.toml
fileNodes.summary: Virtual Cargo workspace manifest (resolver 3, edition 2024) declaring workspace members under crates/* and shared workspace.package metadata.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Project overview documentation for Lib-Itô-Fin covering motivation, current EPIC-0 status, getting-started instructions, project layout, and design principles.

fileNodes.name: TICKETS.md
fileNodes.summary: Dependency-ordered QuantLib to Rust porting backlog: cross-cutting design decisions (D1-D8), epic dependency map (L0-L11), ticket conventions, and Milestone 1 vertical slice.

fileNodes.name: rust-toolchain.toml
fileNodes.summary: Pins the Rust toolchain (1.96.0 with rustfmt and clippy components) so plain cargo uses the project-mandated version across the workspace.

fileNodes.name: check_extension.sh
fileNodes.summary: Pre-commit helper that scans staged files and aborts the commit if any file matches a forbidden extension (e.g. Jupyter notebooks). Sources init.sh for shared environment setup.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses bash arrays populated from git diff and a binary-or-Docker fallback pattern for the linter.
fileNodes.name: hadolint.sh
fileNodes.summary: Lints changed (or all) Dockerfiles using hadolint, falling back to the hadolint Docker image when the binary is absent, and fails the run on any lint error. Sources init.sh and uses scripts/hadolint.yml for rule configuration.

fileNodes.name: hadolint.yml
fileNodes.summary: Hadolint configuration that ignores a curated set of Dockerfile lint rules (DL3003/3006/3008/3013/3020/3022, SC2086) deemed acceptable for this project's images.

fileNodes.name: init.sh
fileNodes.summary: Shared bootstrap sourced by the other helper scripts: enables strict mode, exports the scripts and git root paths, defines terminal color variables, and prepares the hadolint log cache directory.

fileNodes.name: copilot-instructions.md
fileNodes.summary: GitHub Copilot guidance for the libitofin port, codifying the QuantLib-oracle rule, settled design decisions, naming/numeric conventions, error-handling rules, PR sizing, and review expectations across 10 sections.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses docker buildx with --platform for multi-architecture image builds.
fileNodes.name: build.sh
fileNodes.summary: Shell script that builds and pushes the multi-arch (amd64/arm64) prek tooling Docker image to ghcr.io via docker buildx.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Placeholder README for the .github/images tooling-image directory; currently empty.

fileNodes.name: labeler.yml
fileNodes.summary: GitHub Actions labeler configuration mapping changed file paths to PR labels (enhancement, workflows, build, documentation).

fileNodes.name: .understandignore
fileNodes.summary: Ignore-pattern file telling the Understand-Anything tooling which paths to exclude from codebase analysis.

fileNodes.name: config.json
fileNodes.summary: Configuration for the Understand-Anything tooling, setting the output language for generated analysis.

fileNodes.languageNotes: Inherits version and edition from the workspace via version.workspace/edition.workspace.
fileNodes.name: Cargo.toml
fileNodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the core itofin crate (libitofin), declaring the lib target, workspace-inherited version/edition, and the thiserror dependency.
